Answer Review

@for (item of reviewItems; track item.questionNumber) {
Q{{ item.questionNumber }} @if (item.isCorrect) { Correct } @else if (item.selectedAnswer) { Wrong } @else { Skipped }

{{ item.text }}

@for (opt of item.options; track $index) {
{{ optionLetter($index) }} {{ opt }} @if (optionLetter($index) === item.correctAnswer.toUpperCase()) { ✓ Correct } @if (optionLetter($index) === item.selectedAnswer.toUpperCase() && !item.isCorrect) { Your answer }
}
}
